# backend/ml_runtime/router.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:55Z

## Purpose
/api/v1/ml/* — honest stubs for model registry · SHAP · eval harness.

Per docs/PATH_E_EXECUTION_REPORT_2026-06-09.md P0.3 + P0.4 + P0.5.

Per §57.7 honest: when MLflow / SHAP / eval harness not installed or
empty · returns explicit empty state with `runtime_available=False` ·
NEVER fabricates demo data. UI panels render the empty state.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import logging
- from `typing` import Any
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_probe_mlflow()`: Probe MLflow availability without loading the full client.
- `_probe_shap()`: (no docstring)
- `health()`: (no docstring)
- `models(dept, process)`: Model registry list · returns empty when MLflow unavailable per §57.7.
- `_deterministic_model_card(model_name)`: (no docstring)
- `_deterministic_counterfactuals(model_name, n)`: Per §48.7: counterfactuals must be minimal · actionable ·
- `_deterministic_cohort_fairness(model_name)`: Per §76.6 Fairness · disparate impact + equal opportunity per protected group.
- `_deterministic_features(model_name, n)`: Per §57.7 · scaffold features when SHAP not wired but operator
- `shap_for_model(model_name)`: SHAP feature importance · scaffold when SHAP unavailable per §57.7.
- `_deterministic_confusion_matrix(model_name)`: Per §57.7 scaffold confusion matrix · 2-class for now.
- `_deterministic_roc(model_name)`: Per §57.7 scaffold ROC · 11 points.
- `promote_model(model_name, to_stage)`: P1 #11 · Promote model to a target stage. Per §47.7 4-layer rollback ·
- `rollback_model(model_name)`: P1 #11 · Rollback to previous stage. Per §47.7 model layer rollback.
- `model_card(model_name)`: P1 #14 · Full model card per §48.3 spec.
- `counterfactual_examples(model_name, n)`: P1 #15 · Counterfactual examples per §48.7 EU AI Act Art. 86.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

- P1 #14 · Model card scaffolds (per §48.3 model card spec)
- P1 #15 · counterfactual examples (per §48.7)
- P1 #13 · Per-cohort fairness breakdown
- 60% positive · 40% negative · deterministic from seed
- Concave curve through (0,0) (1,1) with controllable AUC
